hyperedges.label: All FastAPI routes guarded by require_role RBAC
Audit chain append-only hash + Merkle + RTI verification
Hybrid RAG: dense + sparse + RRF + synonym + score floor
Rule engine decision flow (value→confidence→operator)
RBAC least-privilege triad (Role × Permission × User)
Tier-1 Streamlit VTM display trio (dashboard + HITL + audit)
All Indian PII recognisers
C1-C5 critical path gates
STRIDE Tampering threat category
Full OCR -> redact -> embed -> extract -> resolve -> verdict pipeline
Pydantic contract models (document + verdict domain)
Rule-engine invariants verified by property tests
